title: Insurance Sales Agent

rationales.taskAutomation: Quote generation, policy comparison, application paperwork, and renewal reminders are automatable end-to-end; needs analysis, trust-building, and complex-risk placement are relationship-gated.
rationales.toolMaturity: Direct-to-consumer quote engines and AI policy-recommendation tools are mature for personal lines (auto, term life, renters).
rationales.adoption: Carriers and aggregators push automated personal-lines sales hard; independent agents and commercial lines lag well behind.
rationales.agenticExposure: An agent can already run the quote-compare-bind loop for simple personal lines and own renewal outreach queues; complex commercial placement stays human.

tasksAtRisk: Generating and comparing quotes across carriers
Routine renewal reminders and follow-up outreach
Answering standard coverage and pricing questions
tasksGrowing: Advisory needs-analysis for life and business clients
Claims advocacy and long-term relationship management
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 41-3021, p25-p75 rounded (commission-heavy; spread widens above p75)
insight: Personal-lines insurance is already sold by software; agents surviving the shift are advisors on complex risk, not quote processors.
